summary: Completed comprehensive testing of XAI Pharma healthcare application. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly.
passed_tests: API Health Check - All 17 backend endpoints working
Dashboard page loads with correct stats (8 patients, 8 predictions, 1 file, 5 models)
Disease Risk Overview tabs (Overview, Chart View, Trends) all functional
Patients page displays patient list correctly
Add new patient dialog works with form validation
Patient detail page shows predictions, drug responses, SHAP analysis, recommendations
Run Prediction button works and generates results
Reports page shows AI analysis data with working tabs
Upload page drag-and-drop CSV functionality works
Schedule page calendar view with month navigation works
Navigation sidebar works for all pages
Quick actions on dashboard work correctly
